body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"description drops commitment \"TestSentinelErrors_AreErrorValues\"","fingerprint":"9a9f3e7563c088c6559b50170a909615619d5996d3af04d242043c3656f19c85","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"rewrite_rejected","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.rewrite_rejected","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment"}

{"rationale":"Most criteria pass: the description is structured with PROBLEM/ROOT CAUSE/PROPOSED FIX/NON-SCOPE and file:line citations, the acceptance criteria are numbered and test-gated, labels include phase/area/kind/cross-refs, and the prompt is otherwise actionable. It loses points because the title is not a clean imperative single-scope title and dependencies are not explicit (`No deps.` or a deps list).","score":6,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite the title as an imperative, single-scope line that names the subsystem and only this child slice.","Add an explicit deps field or state `No deps.` in the bead body."],"waivers_applied":[]}
